exploration_notes: The plugin activation/installation system has three entry points: (1) `src/socket.io/admin/plugins.js` — the admin panel socket handlers for `toggleActive` and `toggleInstall`, (2) `src/plugins/install.js` — the core plugin management logic with `Plugins.toggleActive` and `Plugins.toggleInstall`, and (3) `src/cli/manage.js` — the CLI `activate` and `install` commands. The naming pattern regex is defined in `src/constants.js` as `pluginNamePattern = /^(@[\w-]+\/)?nodebb-(theme|plugin|widget|rewar
